title: randia parviflora
intro: Randia parviflora, also known as the small-flowered randia or small-flower randia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Randia parviflora include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
